title: Quadratic Voting Platform
tagline: Quadratic voting platform for DAO members.
summary: A reusable quadratic-voting module DAOs can drop into any Logos-powered app to weight preference intensity.
description: Plurality vote tallies systematically over-reward narrow majorities. Quadratic voting weights preference intensity instead, but ships of it today are bespoke per DAO. We want a portable QV module — vote storage on Codex, propagation over Waku, identity scoped per Circle — that any Logos App can adopt without rewriting the cryptography. The first integration target is the Circles governance flow.
